body_txt: Being a Half-Human Hybrid is tough. Aside from likely being one of a kind, they also have to deal with Half-Breed Discrimination , struggling balance both sides of their lineage, and generally feeling out of place wherever they go. Naturally, angst will ensue, complete with all sorts of identity issues. May overlap with Half-Breed Discrimination , which is about how other people treat them. See also Freakiness Shame and Bastard Angst .    Final Fantasy
